rulings.Case Title: VIVA! INTERNATIONAL VOICE FOR ANIMALS et al VS. ADIDAS-SALOMON AG et al
rulings.Rulings: PLAINTIFFS VIVA! INTERNATIONAL VOICE FOR ANIMALS and JEROLD FRIEDMAN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT -- Denied; Penal Code Sec. 6530 conflicts with Federal Regulations which permit importation of Kangaroo Products. (302/AJR/PB)

rulings.Case Title: MARY I COCA et al VS. BURNS INTERNATIONAL SERVICES CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Stike (Within The Same Pleading As Deft'S Complaint
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT TOYOTA MOTOR SALES, U.S.A., INC.'s demurrer and Motion To Stike (Within The Same Pleading As Deft'S Complaint) -- Overruled and denied except as to 3rd c/a, enterprise liability pleading must be specific as to brake pads. (302/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: MARY I COCA et al VS. BURNS INTERNATIONAL SERVICES CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT TOYOTA MOTOR SALES, U.S.A., INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT and motion to strike -- Overruled and denied except as to 3rd c/a, enterprise liability pleading must be specific as to brake pads. (302/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: MARY I COCA et al VS. BURNS INTERNATIONAL SERVICES CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT PNEUMO ABEX CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Demurrer as to 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th & 6th causes of action - wrongful death sustained with leave to amend; paragragh 8 must allege facts showing that defendants acts caused a mental condition proximately resulting in uncontrollable impluse to commit suiside . See Grant v. Lathrop, 81 Cal. App. 3rd, 791 (1978). Demurrer as to 5th and 7th c/a - overruled ; see United Western Medical Ctr. v. Superior Court, 42 Cal. App 4th, 500, 505. (302/AJR/PB)

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL KEEGAN et al VS. IRENE S. KIVITZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Deft Irene Kivitz'S Answer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: PLAINTIFFS DANIEL KEEGAN and BETH KEEGAN'S Motion To Strike Deft Irene Kivitz's Answer To Complaint -- Motion to strike denied as to puntive damages defense. Court on own motion strikes all other affirmative defenses because allegation are legal conclusions. Statute of limitation is sustained without leave to amend. As to privity and laches are sustained without leave to amend. Remainder are sustained with leave to amend. (302/AJR/AA)
